claim: For all integers n > 2, Euler's totient phi(n) is even.
predicate: n <= 2 or phi(n) % 2 == 0

claim: For all odd integers n > 2, phi(n) is divisible by 4.
predicate: n % 2 == 0 or n <= 2 or phi(n) % 4 == 0

claim: For all even integers n > 4, phi(n) is divisible by 4.
predicate: n % 2 == 1 or n <= 4 or phi(n) % 4 == 0

claim: For all integers n > 3, if n is odd and composite, then phi(n) is divisible by 8.
predicate: n <= 3 or n % 2 == 0 or is_prime(n) or phi(n) % 8 == 0

claim: For all integers n > 6, if n is even and divisible by 4, then phi(n) is divisible by 8.
predicate: n <= 6 or n % 4 != 0 or phi(n) % 8 == 0

claim: For all integers n > 5, if n is divisible by an odd prime, then phi(n) is divisible by 4.
predicate: n <= 5 or not any(p for p in range(3, int(n**0.5)+1, 2) if n % p == 0 and is_prime(p)) or phi(n) % 4 == 0

claim: For all integers n > 7, if n is a product of two distinct odd primes, then phi(n) is divisible by 8.
predicate: n <= 7 or len([p for p in range(3, n) if n % p == 0 and is_prime(p)]) != 2 or not all(p % 2 == 1 for p in [p for p in range(3, n) if n % p == 0 and is_prime(p)]) or phi(n) % 8 == 0

claim: For all integers n > 8, if n is divisible by 8, then phi(n) is divisible by 16.
For all integers n > 9, if n is divisible by 3 and an odd prime greater than 3, then phi(n) is divisible by 12.
predicate: n <= 9 or n % 3 != 0 or not any(p for p in range(5, n, 2) if n % p == 0 and is_prime(p)) or phi(n) % 12 == 0

claim: For all integers n > 10, if n is an odd composite with exactly two distinct prime factors, then phi(n) is divisible by 16.
predicate: n <= 10 or n % 2 == 0 or len([p for p in range(3, n) if n % p == 0 and is_prime(p)]) != 2 or phi(n) % 16 == 0

predicate: n <= 12 or n % 4 != 0 or len([p for p in range(2, n) if n % p == 0 and is_prime(p)]) < 2 or phi(n) % 16 == 0

For all integers n > 15, if n is divisible by 3 and 5, then phi(n) is divisible by 24.
For all integers n > 14, if n is an odd composite with at least two distinct prime factors and n > 14, then phi(n) is divisible by 24.
